features: WORRY-FREE FLUSHING & BIODEGRADABLE: Say goodbye to dry and scratchy toilet paper, WhyWorry flushable toilet wipes actually clean your rear end, leaving no remnants behind but only calm, cool and soothe feel. With the help of advanced flushable technology, you can feel confident flushing One Wipe At A Time. Made with 100% plant-based and biodegradable fibers, these wet wipes offer an environmentally conscious clean that’s safe for sewer and septic systems.

EXTRA LARGE & THICKER DESIGN: Size always matters when it comes to bum wipes, each Why Worry flushable toilet tissue is generously sized with 20 x 25 cm and made with extra thickness, 40% larger than the other brands. Each butt wipe can cover entire hand of women, men and kids, fold and wipe up to 4 times with only one wipe.

GENTLE FORMULA FOR ALL SKIN: Made with 99% pure water and enriched with Chamomile and Vitamin E, Why Worry hypoallergenic flushable cleaning wipes are plastic-free, latex-free, alcohol-free and pH-balanced. These 100% plant-based and hypoallergenic wipes are safe for all skin typee even sensitive, making them not only perfect for bathroom use but also ideal for daily body cleansing and hygiene purposes.

FLIP-UP TOP LID: WhyWorry extra large flushable wipe can be easily dispensed from the flip-up lid on the pack, the resealable lid keep the wipes moist all the time, ensuring they are always ready for use, just don’t forget to keep the lid tightly sealed.

MULTI-PURPOSE FOR EVERYDAY USE: Say goodbye to traditional plastic wipes, Why Worry wipes are not only for bathroom but versatile, they are perfect for daily personal cleansing, adult incontinence, elderly care, travel, camping, gym or just quick freshening up.
